root_text.an4.99:2.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo attahitāya paṭipanno hoti, no parahitāya?
root_text.an4.99:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo attanā pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, no paraṁ pāṇātipātā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.99:2.3: attanā adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, no paraṁ adinnādānā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.99:2.4: attanā kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato hoti, no paraṁ kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.99:2.5: attanā musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, no paraṁ musāvādā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.99:2.6: attanā surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā paṭivirato hoti, no paraṁ surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā veramaṇiyā samādapeti.
root_text.an4.99:2.7: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo attahitāya paṭipanno hoti, no parahitāya.
root_text.an4.99:3.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo parahitāya paṭipanno hoti, no attahitāya?
root_text.an4.99:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo attanā pāṇātipātā appaṭivirato hoti, paraṁ pāṇātipātā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.99:3.3: attanā adinnādānā appaṭivirato hoti, paraṁ adinnādānā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.99:3.4: attanā kāmesumicchācārā appaṭivirato hoti, paraṁ kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.99:3.5: attanā musāvādā appaṭivirato hoti, paraṁ musāvādā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.99:3.6: attanā surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā appaṭivirato hoti, paraṁ surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā veramaṇiyā samādapeti.
root_text.an4.99:3.7: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo parahitāya paṭipanno hoti, no attahitāya.
root_text.an4.99:4.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo nevattahitāya paṭipanno hoti no parahitāya?
root_text.an4.99:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo attanā pāṇātipātā appaṭivirato hoti, no paraṁ pāṇātipātā veramaṇiyā samādapeti …pe… attanā surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā appaṭivirato hoti, no paraṁ surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā veramaṇiyā samādapeti.
root_text.an4.99:4.3: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo nevattahitāya paṭipanno hoti, no parahitāya.
root_text.an4.99:5.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo attahitāya ceva paṭipanno hoti parahitāya ca?
root_text.an4.99:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo attanā ca pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, parañca pāṇātipātā veramaṇiyā samādapeti …pe… attanā ca surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā paṭivirato hoti, parañca surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā veramaṇiyā samādapeti.
root_text.an4.99:5.3: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo attahitāya ceva paṭipanno hoti parahitāya ca.
root_text.an4.99:5.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an4.99:1.1: “Mendicants, these four individuals are found in the world.
translation_text.an4.99:1.3: One who practices to benefit themselves, but not others;
translation_text.an4.99:1.4: one who practices to benefit others, but not themselves;
translation_text.an4.99:1.5: one who practices to benefit neither themselves nor others; and
translation_text.an4.99:1.6: one who practices to benefit both themselves and others.
translation_text.an4.99:2.1: And how does an individual practice to benefit themselves, but not others?
translation_text.an4.99:2.2: It’s when an individual doesn’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, lie, or consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants. But they don’t encourage others to do the same.
translation_text.an4.99:2.7: That’s how an individual practices to benefit themselves, but not others.
translation_text.an4.99:3.1: And how does an individual practice to benefit others, but not themselves?
translation_text.an4.99:3.2: It’s when an individual kills living creatures, steals, commits sexual misconduct, lies, and consumes beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants. But they encourage others to not do these things.
translation_text.an4.99:3.7: That’s how an individual practices to benefit others, but not themselves.
translation_text.an4.99:4.1: And how does a person practice to benefit neither themselves nor others?
translation_text.an4.99:4.2: It’s when an individual kills, etc. … and doesn’t encourage others to not do these things.
translation_text.an4.99:4.3: That’s how an individual practices to benefit neither themselves nor others.
translation_text.an4.99:5.1: And how does an individual practice to benefit both themselves and others?
translation_text.an4.99:5.2: It’s when an individual doesn’t kill, etc. … and encourages others to do the same.
translation_text.an4.99:5.3: That’s how an individual practices to benefit both themselves and others.
translation_text.an4.99:5.4: These are the four individuals found in the world.”
